legacy_onepager_miracles.source_set: tracked references/cults-upstream/**/*.pdf one-pagers from Notes from Pavis 2019 v5.2
legacy_onepager_miracles.reason: Non-Waha miracle rows remain current app data but are explicitly classified as legacy normalized facts pending future per-cult bounded vision verification; they are no longer represented as unresolved OCR cleanup work.
